perf_hint: every pixel visits each fly, so frame time scales with `flies` — the default dozen is negligible; on software rendering keep it under 20 at 1080p

params.name: flies
params.description: How many fireflies wander the frame.

params.name: size
params.description: How wide a fly's lamp is, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: wander
params.description: How far the swarm spreads and roams from the middle.

params.name: blink
params.description: How often a fly's lamp cycles, in blinks per second.

params.name: flare
params.description: How much a hit flares this second's half of the swarm.

params.name: tint
params.description: How much of the palette colors the lamps; 0 is firefly amber.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the song lifts into the swarm.
